constraints: Template variable substitution MUST use Jinja2 SandboxedEnvironment (not bare Environment); any template expression referencing names outside the allowlist [patient_name, facility_name, payer_name, assessment_summary, coordinator_name] MUST be rejected with 400 before rendering
Email body content (draft_body, draft_subject) MUST NOT appear in AuditEvent new_value_json or any log output; only metadata (action_id, sent_at, sent_by_user_id, delivery_status) may be recorded
Sending is a permanent record; approval_status=sent MUST NOT be transitioned to any other state; cancel endpoint MUST return 409 for sent records
phone_manual and task channel actions MUST be created at approval_status=sent in a single atomic write; no intermediate draft/pending_approval/approved rows are permitted for these channels
The atomic case advance for phone_manual/task MUST use the shared state-machine transition handler; the module MUST NOT write PatientCase.current_status directly
All mutating endpoints (POST, PATCH) MUST reject requests where case.current_status=closed with 409 (enforced by core-infrastructure middleware, verified here)
Template CRUD (POST/PATCH/DELETE on /templates/outreach) is forbidden in this module; only GET is permitted
organization_id scoping MUST be applied to all queries; cross-tenant data MUST never be returned
Only placement_coordinator or admin roles may create, edit, submit, approve, send, or cancel outreach actions
